{{Quote|Turn around or be stunned.|[[Dedra Meero]]|<ref name="Make It Stop">{{Andor|Make It Stop}}</ref>}}
The '''Power 5 blaster''' was a model of [[blaster pistol]] manufactured by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]] and used by the [[Imperial Military]],<ref name="Visual Encyclopedia" /> such as with the hangar [[gantry officer]] [[Lieutenant]] [[Pol Treidum]] on the first [[Death Star]]<ref name="Blasters and Firearms">{{EncyclopediaCite|Blasters and Ranged Weapons}}</ref> in [[1 BBY]].<ref name="IV Date">{{FilmDate|IV|1}}</ref> It was created to compete with [[BlasTech Industries]]'s [[DL-44 heavy blaster pistol]]. It succeeded on the market and became known as a legal, low-power alternative to the DL-44.<ref name="Blasters and Firearms" /> In [[5 BBY]],<ref name="112 Date">{{AndorDate|112}}</ref> [[Dedra Meero]] of the [[Imperial Security Bureau]] used a Power 5 blaster during the [[Ferrix Riot|Uprising on Ferrix]].<ref name="Rix Road" /> She later wielded a Power 5 when she attempted to apprehend [[Luthen Rael]] in 1 [['ABY-BBY' dating system|BBY]].<ref name="Make It Stop" /> Earlier in [[4 BBY]],<ref name="203 Date">{{AndorDate|203}}</ref> the [[Imperial Army trooper]] [[Corporal]] [[Pyke (individual)|Pyke]] used a Power 5 blaster on [[Mina-Rau]].<ref name="Harvest" />

{{Weapon-stub}}
